# Activity 2 {#sec-week2}

Name:

1.  In the first five minutes, talk with the people at your table and introduce yourself. Ask whether anyone needs help getting started with R, and help each other out..

2.  Read the penguins dataset from the package palmerpenguins and analyze the variable flipper_length_mm in palmerpenguins/penguins by displaying the measures of center and disperson. Why the measures of center differ?

<!-- -->

(a) Recompute the mean, median and the standard deviation based on the first 5 observation of flipper_length_mm and repeat the problem by hand. Did you get the same result?

(b) Multiply the variable by 10 and recompute the variance and the coefficient of variation. What do you conclude?

(c) Change the third observation of the variable from 195 to 1000 and recompute the measures of center. What do you conclude?

<!-- -->

3.  Generate the histogram of flipper_length_mm. What is the shape of the distribution? What can you conclude? How does this support your conclusion of previous points? Try generating the histogram with ggplot2. You can check section 1.4 of [r4ds](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/data-visualize.html) to learn how to do it.

4.  What are the quartiles?
